title: Marsh-grubber tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Marsh-grubber''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They often grew near swamps and riverbanks, hence their name.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
